detail.description: Jim Jarvis singles on a line drive to center fielder Jackson Merrill.
Jim Jarvis triples (1) on a fly ball to right fielder Fernando Tatis Jr. Mauricio Dubón scores. Brewer Hicklen scores.
Jim Jarvis singles on a ground ball to right fielder Brandon Nimmo.
Jim Jarvis doubles (3) on a ground ball to right fielder Brandon Nimmo. Dominic Smith scores.
Jim Jarvis singles on a ground ball to center fielder Cam Cauley.
Jim Jarvis singles on a fly ball to left fielder Juan Soto. Dominic Smith scores. Mike Yastrzemski to 3rd.
Jim Jarvis singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jordan Walker. Austin Riley to 3rd.
Jim Jarvis doubles (1) on a fly ball to right fielder Esmerlyn Valdez.
Jim Jarvis singles on a line drive to left fielder Bryan Reynolds. Dominic Smith to 2nd.
Jim Jarvis homers (1) on a fly ball to right field. Mike Yastrzemski scores.
Jim Jarvis singles on a line drive to right fielder Esmerlyn Valdez.
Jim Jarvis doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jordan Walker.
Jim Jarvis singles on a sharp ground ball to shortstop Masyn Winn.
Jim Jarvis singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Andy Pages.
